Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.RestClient.Builder

Packages that use RestClient.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.

  • Uses of RestClient.Builder in org.apache.juneau.rest.client

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client that return RestClient.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.bodyConverter(BodyConverter<?>... value)
    Prepends custom body converters to the default converter list.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.bodyConverters(BodyConverter<?>... value)
    Replaces the entire body converter list (including defaults).
    static RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.builder()
    Returns a new RestClient.Builder.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.defaultParser(Parser value)
    Designates the default parser used when the response Content-Type is absent or matches no registered parser.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.defaultSerializer(Serializer value)
    Designates the default serializer used for outbound bodies when no registered serializer matches the requested media type.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.header(String name, String value)
    Adds a default header sent with every request.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.header(String name, Supplier<String> value)
    Adds a default header with a lazy value, evaluated at each request.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.headers(HttpHeader... value)
    Adds default headers sent with every request.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.interceptors(RestCallInterceptor... value)
    Adds one or more lifecycle interceptors called before/after each request.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.logger(RestLogger value)
    Sets the logger called at the end of every request (success or failure).
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.parser(Parser... value)
    Appends parsers (built into a ParserSet at build time if no set was supplied).
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.parsers(ParserSet value)
    Sets the parser registry used for inbound bodies.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.queryData(String name, String value)
    Adds a default query parameter appended to every request URL.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.queryData(HttpPart... value)
    Adds default query parameters appended to every request URL.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.rootUrl(String value)
    Sets a root URL prefix applied to all relative request URLs (those without ://).
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.serializer(Serializer... value)
    Appends serializers (built into a SerializerSet at build time if no set was supplied).
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.serializers(SerializerSet value)
    Sets the serializer registry used for outbound bodies.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.transport(HttpTransport value)
    Sets the HTTP transport to use.
